purpose: Semantic icon and logo usage index for the stock trading design system. This file records which icon meaning should be used in each product context; it does not replace final Figma icon assets.
languageNote: zhName and zhMeaning are included so PMs and designers can review icon semantics without relying on English only.
sourcePriority: Use the exact icon or logo instance from the current Figma page when available.
Use an existing local icon or logo component listed in tokens.json.
Use the approved semantic fallback in this file and mark it as pending production icon replacement when needed.
globalRules: Do not use random decorative icons for product functions.
Do not replace stock logos with blank circles or unrelated symbols.
Do not use emoji as product icons.
Keep icon-only actions at a minimum 40px touch target.
Use 16px icons for dense metadata, 20px icons for toolbar actions, and 24px icons for primary navigation or standalone icon buttons.
When an icon represents a financial movement, positive uses green, negative uses red, and neutral uses muted text or icon color.
If the real Figma icon is unavailable, use one consistent fallback style within the same prototype or page.

categories.description: Top app bar, bottom navigation, page switching and back navigation.
Add, settings, search, copy, filter and common utility actions.
Watchlist grouping, sorting, row tools and add-to-watchlist actions.
Portfolio, position, wallet, buying power and account-state actions.
Watch alerts, monitoring rules, triggers, reminders and rule states.
Market movement, trend, quote list and stock market metadata.
Stock logos, bank logos and market-specific logo slots.

icons.zhMeaning: 返回上一级页面
avoidUse: do not use for collapse
do not use for market down movement

icons.zhMeaning: 打开页面菜单或更多导航
avoidUse: do not use for row more action when a three-dot icon exists

icons.zhMeaning: 进入大盘或行情总览
avoidUse: do not use for single stock detail
icons.fallback: rounded square with small chart mark

icons.zhMeaning: 进入用户自选股票列表
avoidUse: do not use for portfolio holdings
icons.fallback: rounded square with centered dot or list mark

icons.zhMeaning: 进入机会发现、行情扫描或趋势发现
avoidUse: do not use for confirmed profit

icons.zhMeaning: 进入交易、资产或账户相关入口
avoidUse: do not use for watchlist monitoring

icons.zhMeaning: 设置页面、设置分组或设置当前模块
avoidUse: do not use as monitoring alert icon

icons.zhMeaning: 添加新项目
avoidUse: do not use for positive stock movement

icons.zhMeaning: 复制文本、账号或链接
avoidUse: do not use for duplicate monitoring rule unless copy behavior is explicit

icons.zhMeaning: 展开筛选、分组或时间范围
avoidUse: do not use for page back

icons.zhMeaning: 把股票加入自选列表
avoidUse: do not use for add monitoring if the copy says 盯盘

icons.zhMeaning: 切换或管理自选分组
avoidUse: do not use for stock market tag

icons.zhMeaning: 切换列表排序方式
avoidUse: do not use for trend direction

icons.zhMeaning: 表示用户已经持有该股票或进入持仓分析
avoidUse: do not use for trade execution

icons.zhMeaning: 表示入金、可用资金或购买力
avoidUse: do not use for stock price movement

icons.zhMeaning: 表示用户正在盯盘、管理盯盘规则或进入盯盘页签
avoidUse: do not use as generic message icon when the context is not alert-related

icons.zhMeaning: 表示盯盘条件已经触发
avoidUse: do not use for unread marketing message
icons.fallback: small dot alert or outlined exclamation

icons.zhMeaning: 表示盯盘规则正在生效
avoidUse: do not use for bottom navigation selected if a nav icon exists

icons.zhMeaning: 表示盯盘规则暂时停止
avoidUse: do not use for disabled button if state styling is enough

icons.zhMeaning: 表示走势向上或行情热度上升
avoidUse: do not use for guaranteed profit

icons.zhMeaning: 表示公告、新闻、研报或事件消息
avoidUse: do not use for chat assistant unless the page is conversation-based

icons.zhMeaning: 表示银行或支付渠道
avoidUse: do not use for stock issuer logo

icons.zhMeaning: 表示具体股票或公司
avoidUse: do not replace with blank circle
do not use unrelated generic icon
icons.fallback: ticker text monogram only when the source logo is unavailable and explicitly marked as pending

reviewChecklist: Does every icon-only action have a clear semantic reason?
Does the icon match the product function instead of only matching a visual shape?
Are monitoring, trigger, watchlist, portfolio, and trade meanings separated?
Are stock logos preserved as local logo components?
If a fallback icon is used, is it consistent and marked as pending final asset replacement?
